channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida Democrats gather in Orlando for Leadership Blue 2026 convention
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 reporter Jada Williams sat down with Democratic gubernatorial candidate David Jolly in Orlando.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Taylor Farms recalls lettuce shipped to Florida, 26 other states over cyclospora risk
item.description: Products with the potential to be contaminated with the diarrhea-causing parasite were shipped to 27 states including Florida.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lottery Powerball, Fantasy 5 results for July 18, 2026
